title: mangifera transversalis
intro: Mangifera transversalis, also known as the Philippine horse mango or horse mango, is a species of mango tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Mangifera transversalis include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of the tree are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health issues.
